title: CORRIM Correlation Output
description: The combination contract: CORRIM is the only module permitted to combine SATIM and FPIM outputs. contributing_poi_ids traces which of the referenced FPIM output's pois_along_path were scored against SATIM evidence. Matches the existing fusion-output posture (review_context_only, live_tracking=false). See docs/MODULE_SPEC_CORRIM.md.

contributing_poi_ids.description: footprint_id values drawn from the referenced FPIM output's pois_along_path that this correlation scored against SATIM evidence.
